# Capability Index

Profile: `public`

Generated index of visible `capability` entities.

- [Add Adapter Skill](agent-skill.add-adapter.md) - `capability:agent-skill.add-adapter`: Adapters should connect Agent Atlas to existing systems without making the core vendor-specific.
- [Add Atlas Entity Skill](agent-skill.add-atlas-entity.md) - `capability:agent-skill.add-atlas-entity`: Use this skill when creating or modifying `.agent-atlas/**/*.yaml` files.
- [Design Context Pack Skill](agent-skill.design-context-pack.md) - `capability:agent-skill.design-context-pack`: A context pack is a task-specific, token-budgeted map. It should route the agent, not become the entire source of truth.
- [Implement CLI Command Skill](agent-skill.implement-cli-command.md) - `capability:agent-skill.implement-cli-command`: CLI output should be concise Markdown by default and JSON only with `--json`.
- [Update Schema Skill](agent-skill.update-schema.md) - `capability:agent-skill.update-schema`: Schema changes must keep docs, TypeScript types, JSON Schema, and examples aligned.
